name: Sausage and Chicken Jambalaya
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté sliced bell pepper and onion with butter for 5 minutes.
2. Add the hot sausage to the skillet and continue cooking until heated through, about 5 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. In an 9 x 13-inch baking dish, combine beef broth and rice.
5. Pour in the sausage mixture from the skillet.
6. Place chicken breasts on top of the mixture.
7. Cover with foil and bake for 1 hour.
8. Remove foil and bake for an additional 30 minutes until the chicken is cooked through.
Yield: 4 servings
